summary: Iteration 44 Testing: Cash Book Export Filter Bug Fix - All 27 backend tests PASSED. Verified that exports (PDF/Excel) correctly pass filter parameters (account, txn_type, category, party_type, date_from, date_to, status) to API endpoints.
critical_code_review_comments: CashBook.jsx exportData() function (lines 160-183) correctly passes all txnFilters to export endpoints
Cash Transactions tab automatically adds account=cash to exports (line 167)
Party Summary tab exports (PartySummaryTab.jsx lines 55-62) correctly pass party_type and status filters
Party Ledger page (Ledgers.jsx lines 284-293) correctly passes party_type, date_from, date_to filters
Backend endpoints (cashbook.py lines 626-778, ledgers.py lines 294-352) correctly accept and apply all filter parameters
Tab switching clears category and party_type filters (CashBook.jsx line 227, 232) - Kesinga filter from Party Ledgers won't carry to Cash Transactions
seed_data_used: 17 cash transactions with 4 Agent, 10 Truck, 3 Diesel entries. 4 parties in summary: OD08T2002 (Truck), Titu Fuels (Diesel), Kesinga (Agent), Utkela (Agent)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Cash Book export filter tests passed. The bug fix has been verified: exports now correctly respect applied filters (account, txn_type, category, party_type, date_from, date_to, status). Tab switching clears category and party_type filters.

party_ledgers_tab_exports.test_09_date_range_filter: PASSED - Excel export with date range

party_summary_tab_exports.test_14_pdf_combined_filters: PASSED - PDF export with party_type=Agent + status=settled

party_ledger_page_exports.test_17_pdf_date_range: PASSED - PDF export with date range
party_ledger_page_exports.test_18_excel_combined: PASSED - Excel export with party_type + date range

tab_switching_filter_clear.behavior: category and party_type filters are cleared when switching between Cash Transactions and Party Ledgers tabs
